# `ReadInput`

**Systems:** NES  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Reads input and stores toggled buttons in an internal "buttons" variable.
<p>Example:
<code>
ReadInput();

sprite_x:=sprite_x+getbit(buttons,1)-getbit(buttons,0); // x axis
sprite_y:=sprite_y-getbit(buttons,2)+getbit(buttons,3); // y axis
if (getbit(buttons,4)=0) then
    Jump();

</code>




</div>
